title: catalog audit cannot classify unlabeled in-text figures
resolution: repair_catalog_metadata 已涵蓋（live catalog critical=0）—— audit stage 看到的是 repair 前暫態
evidence: smoke H7 reports 16 image blocks with empty captions; sampled images are inline illustrations without adjacent Figure/Table labels, and extract_rules has no field to mark them decorative or excluded from catalog semantics
proposal: Add a per-book mechanism for unlabeled illustration exclusion/classification in catalog audit so smoke does not fail books whose images have no machine-detectable captions.
